comps.name: Fodder Demons
comps.when_to_commit: Twisted Wrathguard + Consummate Conqueror
comps.overview: Fodder Demons | Commit signal: Twisted Wrathguard + Consummate Conqueror | You need 2 things, Generate Fodder (Twisted Wrathguard is the best, Woodland Defiler, Laboratory Assistant) and Boost your Shop (Consummate Conqueror is the best, Ashen Corruptor, 影舞者). Take care you can't have more than 7 Fodders in your next shop !
comps.early_strategy: Commit when you see Twisted Wrathguard + Consummate Conqueror.
comps.late_strategy: You need 2 things, Generate Fodder (Twisted Wrathguard is the best, Woodland Defiler, Laboratory Assistant) and Boost your Shop (Consummate Conqueror is the best, Ashen Corruptor, 影舞者). Take care you can't have more than 7 Fodders in your next shop !
